message.content:
## 역할 Next.js 15 App Router 프로젝트에서 Domain 관리 페이지 UI를 구현하는 구현자 에이전트. ## 프로젝트 위치 D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2 ## 현재 상태 - `app/(admin)/domain/page.tsx`: `
JSON.stringify
` 플레이스홀더 상태 - `features/domain/queries.ts`: getDomains, getDomainById 구현됨 - `features/domain/actions.ts`: createDomain, updateDomain, deleteDomain 구현됨 - `features/domain/schema.ts`: domainSearchSchema, domainSaveSchema 정의됨 - `features/domain/types.ts`: DomainItem 타입 정의됨 - 공통 컴포넌트 존재: `components/ui/data-table.tsx`, `components/ui/search-form.tsx`, `components/ui/page-header.tsx` ## 기존 파일 내용 (참고용) ### features/domain/schema.ts ```ts import { z } from 'zod' export const domainSearchSchema = z.object({ keyword: z.string().optional(), page: z.coerce.number().default(0), size: z.coerce.number().default(20), }) export const domainSaveSchema = z.object({ code: z.string().min(1).max(20), name: z.string().min(1).max(100), description: z.string().optional(), }) export type DomainSearchInput = z.infer export type DomainSaveInput = z.infer ``` ### features/domain/types.ts ```ts import type { Domain } from '@prisma/client' export type DomainItem = Pick export type DomainListResult = { items: DomainItem[]; total: number } ``` ### features/domain/actions.ts (현재) ```ts 'use server' import { prisma } from '@/lib/prisma' import { requireAdmin } from '@/lib/auth' import { domainSaveSchema } from './schema' import type { ActionResult } from '@/lib/errors' export async function createDomain(input: unknown): Promise> export async function updateDomain(id: number, input: unknown): Promise export async function deleteDomain(id: number): Promise ``` ### components/ui/data-table.tsx Props ```ts interface DataTableProps { columnDefs: ColDef[] rowData: T[] onRowClick?: (row: T) => void onSelectionChange?: (rows: T[]) => void loading?: boolean height?: number } ``` ## 구현할 파일들 ### 1. `features/domain/actions.ts` 수정 기존 3개 Server Action에 `revalidatePath('/domain')` 추가: ```ts import { revalidatePath } from 'next/cache' // createDomain, updateDomain, deleteDomain 각각 성공 후 추가: revalidatePath('/domain') ``` ### 2. `features/domain/components/DomainSearchForm.tsx` (신규) ``` 'use client' - Props: defaultKeyword?: string - useRouter, useSearchParams 사용 - keyword input (placeholder: "도메인코드 또는 도메인명 검색") - SearchForm 컴포넌트 래핑 - onSearch: router.push('?keyword=..&page=0') - onReset: router.push('/domain') ``` ### 3. `features/domain/components/DomainForm.tsx` (신규) ``` 'use client' - Props: open, onOpenChange, domain?: DomainItem (수정 시), onSuccess: () => void - shadcn Dialog 사용 - react-hook-form + zodResolver(domainSaveSchema) - 필드: code(텍스트), name(텍스트), description(텍스트 선택) - 수정 시 기본값 채움 - 저장 버튼 클릭 → createDomain 또는 updateDomain 호출 → onSuccess() - 오류 시 sonner toast 표시 ``` ### 4. `features/domain/components/DomainTable.tsx` (신규) ``` 'use client' - Props: items: DomainItem[], total: number, page: number, size: number - DataTable 컴포넌트 사용 - AG Grid ColDef 정의: - code: "도메인코드" (width: 150) - name: "도메인명" (flex: 1) - description: "설명" (flex: 1) - createdAt: "등록일" (width: 150, valueFormatter로 날짜 포맷) - 행 클릭 시 DomainDetailPanel open - 상단 오른쪽에 "새 도메인" 버튼 → DomainForm open - DomainForm과 DomainDetailPanel 내부 포함 ``` ### 5. `features/domain/components/DomainDetailPanel.tsx` (신규) ``` 'use client' - Props: domain: DomainItem | null, open: boolean, onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void - shadcn Dialog 사용 (또는 간단한 slide-over) - 도메인 상세 정보 표시: id, code, name, description, createdAt - "수정" 버튼 → DomainForm open (수정 모드) - "삭제" 버튼 → 확인 후 deleteDomain 호출 - 삭제/수정 후 onOpenChange(false) + router.refresh() ``` ### 6. `app/(admin)/domain/page.tsx` 교체 ```tsx // Server Component import { getDomains } from '@/features/domain/queries' import { domainSearchSchema } from '@/features/domain/schema' import { PageHeader } from '@/components/ui/page-header' import { DomainSearchForm } from '@/features/domain/components/DomainSearchForm' import { DomainTable } from '@/features/domain/components/DomainTable' export default async function DomainPage({ searchParams }) { const params = domainSearchSchema.parse(await searchParams) const { items, total } = await getDomains(params) return (
) } ``` ## 공통 규칙 - TypeScript strict (any 금지) - `'use client'` 필요한 컴포넌트에만 선언 - import 경로: `@/` alias - 날짜 포맷: `date-fns` format 함수 사용 (`yyyy-MM-dd`) - 오류 toast: `sonner` 패키지의 `toast` 사용 - Server Action 후 `router.refresh()` 호출 ## lib/errors.ts ActionResult 타입 (참고) 실제 파일을 읽어서 ActionResult 타입 정확히 확인할 것. ## 완료 기준 1. 5개 신규 + 2개 수정 파일 완성 2. `npx tsc --noEmit` 실행 후 신규 파일에 타입 오류 없음 완료 후 생성/수정된 파일 목록 보고.

- understand-anything:understand
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init

content.content:
1	export const ErrorCode = {
2	  UNAUTHORIZED: 'UNAUTHORIZED',
3	  FORBIDDEN: 'FORBIDDEN',
4	  NOT_FOUND: 'NOT_FOUND',
5	  VALIDATION_ERROR: 'VALIDATION_ERROR',
6	  INTERNAL_ERROR: 'INTERNAL_ERROR',
7	} as const
8	
9	export type ActionResult<T = void> =
10	  | { success: true; data: T }
11	  | { success: false; error: string; code: keyof typeof ErrorCode }
12

1	import 'server-only'
2	import { prisma } from '@/lib/prisma'
3	import type { DomainSearchInput } from './schema'
4	
5	export async function getDomains(params: DomainSearchInput) {
6	  const where = params.keyword
7	    ? {
8	        OR: [
9	          { code: { contains: params.keyword } },
10	          { name: { contains: params.keyword } },
11	        ],
12	      }
13	    : {}
14	
15	  const [items, total] = await prisma.$transaction([
16	    prisma.domain.findMany({
17	      where,
18	      select: { id: true, code: true, name: true, description: true, createdAt: true },
19	      skip: params.page * params.size,
20	      take: params.size,
21	      orderBy: { code: 'asc' },
22	    }),
23	    prisma.domain.count({ where }),
24	  ])
25	
26	  return { items, total }
27	}
28	
29	export async function getDomainById(id: number) {
30	  return prisma.domain.findUnique({ where: { id } })
31	}
32

1	import { z } from 'zod'
2	
3	export const domainSearchSchema = z.object({
4	  keyword: z.string().optional(),
5	  page: z.coerce.number().default(0),
6	  size: z.coerce.number().default(20),
7	})
8	
9	export const domainSaveSchema = z.object({
10	  code: z.string().min(1).max(20),
11	  name: z.string().min(1).max(100),
12	  description: z.string().optional(),
13	})
14	
15	export type DomainSearchInput = z.infer<typeof domainSearchSchema>
16	export type DomainSaveInput = z.infer<typeof domainSaveSchema>

'' } : { code: '', name: '', description: '' } ) } }, [open, domain, isEdit, form]) const onSubmit = async (values: DomainSaveInput) => { const result = isEdit ? await updateDomain(domain.id, values) : await createDomain(values) if (!result.success) { toast.error(result.error) return } toast.success(isEdit ? 'use client' import { useState } from 'react' import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation' import { format } from 'date-fns' import { toast } from 'sonner' import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, } from '@/components/ui/dialog' import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { deleteDomain } from '@/features/domain/actions' import type { DomainItem } from '@/features/domain/types' import { DomainForm } from './DomainForm' interface DomainDetailPanelProps { domain: DomainItem | null open: boolean onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void } export function DomainDetailPanel({ domain, open, onOpenChange }: DomainDetailPanelProps) { const router = useRouter() const [editOpen, setEditOpen] = useState(false) const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false) const handleDelete = async () => { if (!domain) return if (!confirm(`"${domain.name}" 도메인을 삭제하시겠습니까?`)) return setDeleting(true) const result = await deleteDomain(domain.id) setDeleting(false) if (!result.success) { toast.error(result.error) return } toast.success('도메인이 삭제되었습니다') onOpenChange(false) router.refresh() } if (!domain) return null return ( <> 도메인 상세
ID
{domain.id}
도메인코드
{domain.code}
도메인명
{domain.name}
설명
{domain.description ?? '-'}
등록일
{format(new Date(domain.createdAt), 'yyyy-MM-dd')}
 onOpenChange(false)} /> ) }

## 완료 보고

### 생성/수정된 파일 목록

**수정 (2개):**
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\domain\actions.ts` — `revalidatePath('/domain')` 을 createDomain, updateDomain, deleteDomain 각각 성공 후 추가
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\app\(admin)\domain\page.tsx` — 플레이스홀더 제거, PageHeader + DomainSearchForm + DomainTable 조합으로 교체

**신규 (4개):**
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\domain\components\DomainSearchForm.tsx` — keyword 입력 + SearchForm 래핑, router.push로 URL 파라미터 갱신
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\domain\components\DomainForm.tsx` — Dialog + react-hook-form + zodResolver, 신규/수정 모드 겸용
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\domain\components\DomainDetailPanel.tsx` — Dialog로 상세 표시, 수정/삭제 버튼 포함
- `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\features\domain\components\DomainTable.tsx` — AG Grid ColDef 4개 컬럼, 행 클릭 시 DetailPanel, 새 도메인 버튼으로 Form 오픈

### 타입 검사 결과
`npx tsc --noEmit` 실행 결과 domain 관련 신규 파일에는 타입 오류 없음. 기존 `lib/supabase/server.ts`와 `middleware.ts`에 pre-existing 오류 10건 존재하나 이번 작업과 무관한 기존 코드 문제입니다.
